entity.summary: Malaysian-origin centralized crypto exchange platform offering instant buy/sell, spot trading, OTC services, staking, auto-invest, markets, APIs, and mobile trading access.
entity.notes: The official About page describes Hata as a Malaysian crypto exchange accessible globally. The current global site states that it is regulated by the Labuan Financial Services Authority and exposes current exchange, spot, OTC, staking, and app functions.

evidence.title: Hata About Us
evidence.notes: First-party About page describes Hata as a Malaysian crypto exchange with global access and identifies the founders and product mission.

evidence.title: Hata global exchange website
evidence.notes: Current first-party site exposes instant buy/sell, spot exchange, OTC, staking, auto-invest, markets, rewards, and app access, and states regulation by the Labuan Financial Services Authority.

evidence.title: Hata AML and compliance guidelines
evidence.notes: Current first-party compliance page documents Hata's AML, KYC, risk-monitoring, travel-rule, and sanctions-screening controls and was updated in February 2026.
